title: Home Renovation & Joinery Fitout — Willoughby
summary: Full home joinery fitout in Willoughby covering kitchen, laundry, wardrobes, mudroom and vanity spaces with multiple materials selection for each area .
heroAlt: Willoughby renovation with custom kitchen,Finger Grooved / handless shaker profile
overview: This Willoughby project is one of the strongest residential case studies in the site because it shows how multiple spaces can be tied together with one clear joinery language. The cabinetry carries a refined shaker profile, warmer timber accents and better-integrated storage across the key daily-use rooms.
materials: Kitchen: hidden finger-pull shaker doors and handleless shaker detailing
Colour: Dulux Lamb’s Ear Half polyurethane finish through the kitchen
Wardrobes & supporting joinery: white polyurethane and Polytec Coastal Oak Woodmatt
Mudroom: white polyurethane satin with a 32mm Laminex oak-look benchtop
Vanities and laundry: custom-built storage designed to m match the wider fitout

spaces.title: Kitchen
spaces.text: The kitchen is the hero of the project, built as a special-order handleless shaker design with hidden finger-pull detailing. It balances a classic profile with a restrained finish palette so the space feels premium without being overstated.

spaces.title: Mudroom
spaces.text: The mudroom brought bench seating, overhead joinery and grab-and-go storage into the entry sequence. It is a practical room, but one that still feels connected to the rest of the renovation.

spaces.title: Wardrobes
spaces.text: Two wardrobe expressions were used in the project — white polyurethane and Coastal Oak — both designed around practical internal layouts, drawers and hanging space rather than just door fronts.

spaces.title: Vanities
spaces.text: The bathroom joinery kept the fitout feeling complete. Floating vanities and mirrored storage gave each bathroom a calmer, more custom feel while still focusing on function.

spaces.title: Laundry
spaces.text: Full-height laundry storage, a clean appliance layout and durable finishes helped turn a purely practical room into a better organised daily-use space.

outcome: The completed home feels more tailored and resolved because the joinery is consistent from room to room, with storage, finish quality and detailing all working toward the same result.
ctaText: Planning a kitchen renovation or a multi-room joinery fitout in Sydney? Send through your plans, photos or ideas and we can help shape the layout, storage and finish direction from quote to installation.
